title: puccinellia distans var. minor
intro: Puccinellia distans var. minor, also known as narrow-leaved alkali grass or narrow salt grass, is a plant species belonging to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Puccinellia distans var. minor include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma.
